label: Tip set
description: Defines a named collection of gameplay tips displayed on the loading screen. Each tip is a localized string that can be translated via its TKey attribute.

tips.label: Tips
tips.description: List of gameplay tips shown on the loading screen. Each entry is a localizable string; the TKey attribute on each element is used by the translation system.

new-tip-set.label: New tip set
new-tip-set.description: Minimal tip set with a defName and an initial tips list ready for authoring.
